LINKURA_MOD_KEYWORD_COLLECT.title: Collect
LINKURA_MOD_KEYWORD_COLLECT.description: Deal damage to a random enemy equal to the number of ❤️ you have, then lose all ❤️.
LINKURA_MOD_KEYWORD_BACKSTAGE.title: Backstage
LINKURA_MOD_KEYWORD_BACKSTAGE.descriptio: Triggers while this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], whenever the stated condition is met.
